title: Intraday Source Item
description: Raw item fetched from any configured source before normalization.

source_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by the originating source (e.g. RSS guid, API record id).

source_name.description: Human-readable label for the source (e.g. 'CoinDesk RSS', 'Reuters API').

source_url.description: Canonical URL of the original item. Null when not available.

title.description: Raw title or headline from the source.

body.description: Raw body text or description from the source. Null when not available.

published_at.description: Publication timestamp from the source (ISO-8601). Null if the source does not provide one.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the item was fetched by the ingestion step (ISO-8601).

raw_json.description: Original source payload preserved for debugging and re-processing.

examples.title: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $120K
examples.body: Bitcoin surged past $120,000 on Wednesday, setting a new all-time high...
